evals.prompt: I have 120 essays with titles, dates, and topics. Choose a simple structure that will still work at 500 essays.
evals.expected_output: A writing-index decision with title/date/topic records, filtering only if useful, and a growth test.
assertions: The output does not require unique thumbnails for every essay.
The growth test uses the same record schema.

evals.prompt: My main content is a 12-year work history with organizations, roles, and dates. I need a concise personal site.
evals.expected_output: A chronological-ledger or a clearly justified alternative based on the primary task.
assertions: Time is considered as the natural organizing key.
At least two alternatives are rejected with reasons.

evals.prompt: Make a profile with a hero, bento features, timeline, carousel, testimonials, and blog cards because that feels modern.
evals.expected_output: The agent rejects motif mixing unless user tasks justify it and selects a coherent dominant grammar.
assertions: Visual trend requests do not override user-task structure.
A justified-hybrid is not used without distinct tasks.
